mapper.select: SELECT q.POST_SN , q.QNA_CTG_CD , q.SECR_YN , q.ANSW_STAT_CD , q.ANSW_CN , q.ANSWR_USER_ID , q.ANSW_DT , b.POST_SJ , b.POST_CN , b.WRTR_USER_ID , b.REG_DT , b.MDFCN_DT , c1.COM_CD_NM AS QNA_CTG_NM , c2.COM_CD_NM AS ANSW_STAT_NM FROM QNA q JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = q.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.CL_CODE = '105' AND c1.COM_CD = q.QNA_CTG_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CD c2 ON c2.CL_CODE = '104' AND c2.COM_CD = q.ANSW_STAT_CD WHERE q.POST_SN = #{postSn}
